title: Bob PvP
description: A PvP Based Texture Pack of Bob - "I may not have a brain gentlemen but i have an idea"
body:
# BOB PVP 
### This is a pack made by Nexlr91 , textures used are credited in the pack .
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
This pack is a PvP Based pack of Bob a character from "**Monster vs Aliens**" 

## Consists Of :

- **Custom totem & textures**
- **all the pvp essentials**
- **a custom totem pop sound**
- **sky**
- **a custom glint by spryzeen!**
- **optifine is required for the sky**

![Pack Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bf1c68af2ce0f76db3cac0a5bda0d48527b7aff.png)
